item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 113 pts (0.459) Buffalo Sabres – 109 pts (0.443) Tampa Bay Lightning – 106 pts (0.431) Montreal Canadiens – 106 pts (0.431) Boston Bruins – 100 pts (0.407) Ottawa Senators – 99 pts (0.402) Pittsburgh Penguins – 98 pts (0.398) Philadelphia Flyers – 98 pts (0.398) Washington Capitals – 95 pts (0.386) Detroit Red Wings – 92 pts (0.374) Columbus Blue Jackets – 92 pts (0.374) New York Islanders – 91 pts (0.37) New Jersey Devils – 87 pts (0.354) Florida Panthers – 84 pts (0.341) Toronto Maple Leafs – 78 pts (0.317) New York Rangers – 77 pts (0.313) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
